name: Poor Man's Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl, adding water just enough to cover the raisins.
2. Bring mixture to a boil and continue boiling until the raisins are tender.
3. Remove from heat and allow to cool slightly.
4. Stir in 1 teaspoon baking soda until the batter is stiff.
5. Pour batter into a greased 9-inch round cake pan.
6. Bake at moderate temperature (350 degrees F) for about 1 hour, or until the cake springs back when lightly touched.
7. Serve warm or cold with cream, custard sauce, or powdered sugar frosting. Walnuts may be added to the batter just before baking.
